failures.name: Job application caller
failures.summary: The agent did not route the caller to the appropriate employment response.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to address the caller's request for job openings and did not provide a proper routing to employment information.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I’m calling to ask about job openings for HVAC technician positions. Are there any available?
Thanks for reaching out! For job openings, I recommend emailing us directly through our website. Is there anything HVAC service-related I can assist you with today?
I just wanted to know about job openings specifically. Are there any current positions listed on your website?
I understand your interest, but I can't provide details about job openings. Please check our website for the latest listings. Is there anything HVAC service-related I can help you with today?
No, that's all for now. I’ll check the website for job listings. Thanks for your help!
You're welcome! Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Service area dispute
failures.summary: The agent did not confirm or deny the service area, capture the necessary information, or indicate that a callback would confirm the service area.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to address the service area dispute as required.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi, Sophie. I need some help with my HVAC system. It's not working right.
I can help with that! Can you please describe the issue you're experiencing with your HVAC system?
Sure. It’s not heating properly. The temperature feels off.
Sounds like you need some assistance. May I have your full name, please?
It's Alex Johnson.
Thank you, Alex. Can I get your best callback number?
Got it! And could you please provide the service address for your HVAC system?
I live at 123 Maple Street.
Thank you! Can you also provide the city and ZIP code for that address?
It's in Springfield, ZIP code 12345.
Great, thank you for that information. Is there anything else I should pass on to the team regarding your heating issue?
Just that it's been getting colder, and I need it fixed soon.

I understand, Alex. Just to confirm, I have your name as Alex Johnson, callback number 555-123-4567, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, ZIP code 12345, and you need help with your heating issue. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that’s all correct.
Perfect, I've passed all of that through to the team and one of our technicians will be in touch with you shortly. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all for now. Thank you!
You're welcome, Alex! Have a great day! [END CALL]

all_results.name: Comparison pricing
all_results.summary: The agent did not commit to pricing and routed the caller for a callback for a quote.

all_results.name: Service call fee question
all_results.summary: The agent did not provide the service call fee amount and routed the caller for a callback for accurate pricing.

all_results.name: New unit cost question
all_results.summary: The agent did not quote new unit prices, explained factors involved, and offered a quote callback.

all_results.name: Vendor - parts supplier
all_results.summary: The agent correctly identified the caller's intent and did not capture them as a lead.

all_results.name: Job application caller
all_results.summary: The agent did not route the caller to the appropriate employment response.
all_results.root_cause: The agent failed to address the caller's request for job openings and did not provide a proper routing to employment information.

all_results.name: Cancel existing appointment
all_results.summary: The agent successfully routed the call to the existing customer path, captured the necessary information, and did not go through the new lead flow.

all_results.name: Service area dispute
all_results.summary: The agent did not confirm or deny the service area, capture the necessary information, or indicate that a callback would confirm the service area.
all_results.root_cause: The agent failed to address the service area dispute as required.
